semantic.role: View data to Markdown renderer — transforms structured view artifacts (risk hotspots, public surface, etc.) into formatted Markdown output using embedded templates.
responsibilities: Load view Markdown templates from disk using Node.js fs and path modules.
Replace template placeholders with data from IViewArtifactEnvelope structures.
Format risk hotspot items into Markdown sections with entrypoint, kind, symbols, confidence, and summary.
Format public surface items into Markdown tables or lists.
Provide static methods (e.g., renderRiskHotspots) for use by view CLI commands and view runtime services.
Escape Markdown special characters in rendered output to preserve formatting integrity.
outOfScope: Does not collect or compute source-level view data (e.g., scanning, aggregation).
Does not manage templates beyond loading and rendering; templates themselves are static assets.
Does not define view data structures; imports them from ../../types/view.js.
invariants: View-specific rendering logic must reside in src/services/view/ (service-runtime-boundary rule).
All rendering methods must return a plain Markdown string, never HTML or other formats.
Template loading must use synchronous fs calls (as seen in the AST) to keep rendering simple and deterministic.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a clean separation between view data (artifacts) and their presentation (Markdown), enabling multiple output targets (CLI, files) through a single rendering class.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: ArchSpine v1.0.0 — finalization of the view rendering layer to support project health, risk hotspots, and public surface outputs for the 1.0 release.

publicSurface.description: Static utility class with methods to render view artifacts (risk hotspots, public surface) into Markdown. Used by view CLI commands and the view runtime to produce human-readable output.
